summary.headline: Archer-Daniels-Midland appoints Ismael Roig as Interim CFO with cash stipend and RSU grant.
summary.narrative_summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland Company announced the appointment of Ismael Roig as Interim Chief Financial Officer effective January 21, 2024. On March 18, 2024, the Board's Compensation and Succession Committee approved a cash stipend of $35,000 per month and a one-time RSU grant valued at $1,000,000 for Roig's service. The RSUs vest in full on the one-year anniversary of the grant date, subject to continued service and potential forfeiture if Roig retires before a successor is appointed.

extraction_notes: The filing only discusses the appointment of Ismael Roig as Interim CFO and related compensation. No financial results or guidance are included.
